snapshot.description: The app currently fails to login with 'Lỗi kết nối dữ liệu người dùng' because Firestore Security Rules expired on 2026-04-30. This task fixes the rules and improves error logging in AuthCubit.
snapshot.title: Fix Login failure due to expired Firestore Rules

newValue.text: Update firestore.rules to remove hardcoded expiration and enforce auth.
Add error logging in AuthCubit to capture actual Firestore exceptions.
